title: Document Percentage with an executable example
scenario: A doc example should show normal usage and handle fallible APIs without unwrap or expect.
instructions: Keep the existing Display implementation and tests. Add a doc comment example above Percentage that asserts on the Result returned by TryFrom.

hints.body: Put the doc comment directly above pub struct Percentage.
In the example, compare Result values or use is_err(); do not use unwrap, expect, or panic.
One complete solution for Document Percentage with an executable example is shown below.

completionExplanation: Percentage now has executable documentation that shows both successful and failing construction without panicking helpers.
